summary: Census block racial composition data for Bay Area with school district, urban growth area, and metropolitan area identifiers.
Plan Bay Area 2040 jurisdiction-level female population projections by age group from 2010 to 2040.
RHNA 5 housing opportunity site data for Bay Area with affordability tiers, capacity, PDA status, and APN.
Transit Priority Area (TPA) buffer polygons for Bay Area with distance and geographic boundaries.
Transit-rich areas outside PDAs in Bay Area with designation and geographic boundaries.
Urban edge housing opportunity sites outside Urban Growth Boundary for Bay Area with mid-range unit capacity and zoning data.
Recyclable housing opportunity sites for Bay Area with RHNA appearance count, small site flag, density, and existing use.
Eastern Waterfront employment focus area boundary polygon for Bay Area with name, area, and perimeter.
Bay Area parcel data with zoning, ground land area, lot square footage, lot acreage, mailing address, and year built.
Census block racial composition data for Bay Area showing 18+ population in two-race combinations.
Bay Area parcel data with owner name, mailing address, APN, and city/county code.
Bay Area late night transit route data with route type, agency, service class, median headways, and route colors.
RHNA 5 housing opportunity sites for Bay Area with site type, bundling status, small site flag, and affordability levels.
AHSC (Affordable Housing and Sustainable Communities) qualifying parcels for Bay Area with APN, acreage, and use codes.
Block group rent burden shares (30%+ of income) for Bay Area with non-white renter and low-income household percentages.
2010 Census block group boundaries for Bay Area's nine counties with FIPS codes and land/water area.
ACS census tract employment history data for Bay Area by age group, tracking work in the past 12 months.
Bay Area paratransit service areas with operating hours, service name, responsible agency, and day of week.
Bay Area Vital Signs county-level housing production data by year with single-family, multi-family, and mobile home counts.
Bay Area Communities of Concern (COCs) data using ACS 2014-2018 with minority, low income, disabled, and zero-vehicle household percentages.
California Geological Survey liquefaction study zones for Bay Area with quad names, report links, and revision dates.
PDA eligible area boundaries for Bay Area with designation types and geographic polygons.
TOC draft corridor station areas for Bay Area with TOC tier weights, parcel counts, corridor IDs, and jurisdictions.
Bay Area parcel-level hazard data with landslide study, liquefaction susceptibility, and fault zone flags.
Rent burden data (30%+ of income) for Bay Area by renter building size category.
Priority Development Areas (PDAs) by designation with plan status, SCS status, subregion, gross and net acreage.
Block group counts of renter buildings that are 5-19 units for Bay Area with rent burden and non-white renter data.
Bay Area parcel data with development information, lots, developer name, and phase data.
Block group share of households below poverty level for Bay Area with non-white and low-income renter percentages.
Cal Fire North Bay wildfire perimeters from October 2017 with fire names and geographic extent.
Bay Area transit neighborhood tier 4 (frequent bus) stops with mode, route name, city name, and street data.
Connected Communities eligible areas within High Resource Areas (HRAs) for Bay Area with shape geometry.
Zoning polygon layer for Bay Area with zoning codes, created/revision dates, and revision comments.
Bay Area travel model super district boundaries with county FIPS and district IDs.
Bay Area housing opportunity sites needing upzoning with RHNA cycle data, affordability flags, and APN.
